text: Moving from the quiet, almost clinical entrance with its white walls and functional objects, I transition into the vibrant, visually dynamic R+D space. The first space felt sterile and a bit disorienting, tilting my perspective and leaving me hyper-aware of my place in the architecture. Entering the R+D area, I am energized and curious, surrounded by colors and displays inviting inquiry. There is a sense of anticipation here, as if on the threshold of discoveries about the intertwining of humanity and technology. I feel engaged, alert, and primed to explore.
